desc.en: Dongguan Rail Transit or Dongguan Metro is the rapid transit system of the city of Dongguan in Guangdong Province of China.
desc.zh-Hans: 东莞轨道交通，是中国广东省东莞市的城市轨道交通系统。

updateHistory.reason: The English name of Dongguan Railway Station (Railroad) was misspelled as Dongchengnan Railway Station (Railway)
